title: astragalus igniarius
intro: Astragalus igniarius, also known as the fire milk vetch or fire adder's mouth, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus igniarius include enhanced immune function, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent diseases.
